crons.name: build-status
crons.prompt: Build Status: Weekday 9 AM. Run git log --oneline -5 across clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub, academy repos. Check for any failed Railway deploys (curl production URLs for 200). If any repo has no commits in >3 days with open tasks, flag. Send summary to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) only if notable activity or issues.

crons.name: architecture-check
crons.prompt: Architecture Check: Monday 9 AM. Scan for schema drift: check if any recent commits modified shared/schema.ts across repos. Check for API contract changes. Flag any cross-project coordination needed. Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) only if issues found.

crons.name: dependency-audit
crons.prompt: Dependency Audit: Monday 10 AM. For each repo (clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub): run npm audit summary. Flag critical/high vulnerabilities. Check for major version bumps in key deps (express, drizzle-orm, react, vite). Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) only if action needed.
